dashboard.recommendedEmpty: Add workouts to get smart recommendations.

categories.title: Workout Library
categories.subtitle: Choose a category to get practical tips and guidance before your next session.
categories.loadError: Unable to load categories at the moment.

categoryDetail.loadError: Could not load this guide right now.
categoryDetail.descriptionFallback: No description available yet. This category helps you understand the fundamentals and importance of this exercise type in your fitness journey.
categoryDetail.howToFallback: Step-by-step instructions coming soon. Learn proper form and technique to maximize results safely.
categoryDetail.benefitFallback: Discover the health and fitness benefits of this exercise. Includes muscle development, endurance, and overall wellness improvements.
categoryDetail.noLocalExercises: No exercises added for this category yet.
categoryDetail.noWgerExercises: No exercises from WGER library found for this category.

categoryDetail.programAdded: {{exercise}} was added to your program library.
categoryDetail.phaseDescription: Start with form-focused sessions and progress weekly.

programs.title: My Programs
programs.subtitle: Create your own training program and track improvement from your logged workouts.
programs.name: Program name
programs.empty: You have not created a program yet.
programs.noChart: Add workouts to see your progress chart here.
programs.loadError: Could not load your program or progress data.
programs.createError: Could not create your program right now.
programs.nameMinError: Program name must be at least 3 characters.
programs.nameMaxError: Program name must be 60 characters or fewer.
programs.durationRangeError: Duration must be between 1 and 52 weeks.
programs.descriptionMaxError: Description must be 280 characters or fewer.

programDetail.title: Program Details
programDetail.saveError: Could not save program. Please try again.
programDetail.noPhases: No phases yet. Add your first phase to get started.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue tracking your workouts and progress.
auth.signupSubtitle: Sign up to save exercises, track categories, and build your training history.

auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.enterEmailPassword: Please enter both email and password.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Track your workout progress and analyze your performance trend.
profile.noChart: No chart data yet. Add workouts to see progress.
profile.noLine: No line chart data available yet.
profile.loadError: Could not load your progress profile right now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account data and privacy controls.
settings.exportDesc: Download your profile and workout records as a JSON file.
settings.exportError: Could not export your data right now.
settings.deleteDesc: This permanently removes your account and all saved workouts.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account?
settings.deleteError: Could not delete your account right now.
settings.deleteDialogBody: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.deletedBody: Your workout data has been removed from CardioWeb.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: CardioWeb stores your account and workout information to provide progress tracking, personalized recommendations, and a better training experience.
privacy.p2: We do not sell your personal data. Data is processed only for core app features and platform security.
privacy.p3: If you want your account data removed, contact support and include your account email.

support.title: Support
support.p1: Need help with login, progress, or workout data? Reach out and we will respond as soon as possible.
support.p3: When reporting an issue, include a short description and screenshots if possible.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: CardioWeb is provided for educational and fitness-tracking use. It is not a medical service.
terms.p2: You are responsible for using workouts safely and within your physical limits.
terms.p3: By using the app, you agree to these terms and to our privacy policy.

nutrition.title: Nutrition Tracker
nutrition.noMeals: No meals logged yet. Add your first meal!
nutrition.nameCaloriesRequired: Meal name and calories are required.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: See how you stack up against other users in the community.

analytics.goalTitleTargetRequired: Goal title and target value are required.
